summary: Iteration 5 testing for Karigars, assignment, qty edit, and procurement material requirement. Backend fully validated (workers CRUD, assignment/qty history events, BOM formula 12.24 and 3549.6 exact, PDF returned). Frontend visually validated for Karigars page, Add Karigar drawer, Production KARIGARS section with 7 Assign buttons, Material Req. button on card, Combine checkbox, header 'MATERIAL REQUIREMENT (1)' button, and Assign Karigar dialog listing Ajay.
passed: PATCH /api/production/jobs/{jid}/assignment with worker_id -> assignments.upper={worker_id,worker_name:'Ajay'}; history event='assignment_update' appended
PATCH /api/production/jobs/{jid}/quantity -> qty=115, completed=110, rejected=5 persisted; history event='quantity_update' with old_quantity=120, new_quantity=115, reason='test'
POST /api/procurement/requirement -> returns jobs+materials with correct shape; styles without BOM correctly return empty materials
BOM formula exact match: rate=290, qty=1, yield=10, waste=2%, pairs=120 => total_qty_required=12.24, total_cost=3549.6
POST /api/procurement/requirement.pdf -> 200, body starts %PDF-1.4 (3482 bytes), Content-Disposition filename present, content-type application/pdf
Karigars sidebar entry navigates to /workers; Ajay rows visible in table
New Karigar drawer opens with Name/Phone/Skill/Rate per Pair/Notes/Active + Save
Production page shows KARIGARS section with 34 Assign buttons (7 per procurement card)
Production card shows blue 'Material Req.' button and 'Combine' checkbox in header
Checking Combine reveals 'MATERIAL REQUIREMENT (1)' button in page header
Assign Karigar dialog opens listing Ajay workers with rate badges

failed.issue: PATCH /api/workers/{wid} rejects partial payload (e.g. {rate_per_pair:18}) with 422 'name field required'. Endpoint requires full Worker object; not true PATCH semantics. Frontend likely sends full object so UI works, but the API contract diverges from REST PATCH convention.

action_items: Optional: make /api/workers/{wid} PATCH accept partial updates (Pydantic model with all optional fields) for true REST semantics.

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 critical endpoints; minor PATCH semantics nit)
